# README Footer Template

## 📚 Architecture & Guidelines

For project-wide standards, see the [main documentation](../../docs/):

- **[Code Style Guide](../../docs/guidelines/code-style.md)** — Naming conventions and coding standards
- **[State Management Guide](../../docs/guidelines/state-management.md)** — MobX patterns and best practices

See [ACTIVITY.md](./ACTIVITY.md) for recent bug fixes, issues, and resolutions in this app.

## 📖 Contributing

Before submitting PRs, ensure you follow:
- Code style guidelines from [docs/guidelines/code-style.md](../../docs/guidelines/code-style.md)
- Testing standards from [docs/guidelines/](../../docs/guidelines/)
- Update [ACTIVITY.md](./ACTIVITY.md) if fixing a known issue
